div1.entryFree: Shoulder-clapper, one that shows cordial favour and applause; and one who claps on the shoulder by way of arrestation; quibblingly: a back-friend, a s. Err. IV, 2, 37 (cf. for one signification: LLL V, 2, 107; Ado I, 1, 261 and Troil. III, 3, 139; for the other: As IV, 1, 48 and Cymb. V, 3, 78).
